case_title: GARRISON, RONALD D. VS WILLIAMS, MATTHEW et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,621.97 FILED BY GARRISON, RONALD D. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MATTHEW MCC TRANSPORTATION, INC. DBA MC TRANSPORTATION INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRISON, RONALD D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MATTHEW MCC TRANSPORTATION, INC. DBA MC TRANSPORTATION INC PLAINTIFF CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME AS MMC TRANSPORTATION, INC. DEFENDANT MMC TRANSPORTATION INC. WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF APPEAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO DEFT MCC TRANSPORTATION INC. DBA MC TRANSPORTATION RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO WILLIAMS, MATTHEW RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PARTY FILED BY GRETCHEN MOORE ON BEHALF OF MMC TRANSPORTATION, INC.
